# Auto-generated CMakeLists.txt for Telegram Bot API C++ models
# Generated by telegram-api-generator. Do not edit manually.
              
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.1)

set(CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE "$ENV{VCPKG_ROOT}/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake" CACHE STRING "")
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
              
project(tgbot-lib
    VERSION 1.0.0
    LANGUAGES CXX
    DESCRIPTION "Telegram Bot API C++ models"
)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

find_package(OpenSSL REQUIRED)
if(OpenSSL_FOUND)
    message("Found OpenSSL!")
    add_compile_definitions(CPPHTTPLIB_OPENSSL_SUPPORT)
else()
    message("Couldn't find OpenSSL!")
endif()

find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
pkg_check_modules(test REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET libcoro)
find_package(httplib)
find_package(nlohmann_json)

    src/types/VideoQuality.cpp
    src/types/Voice.cpp
    src/types/WebAppData.cpp
    src/types/WebAppInfo.cpp
    src/types/WebhookInfo.cpp
    src/types/WriteAccessAllowed.cpp
)

# Create library target
add_library(tgbot-lib SHARED
    ${TELEGRAM_MODELS_SOURCES}
)

target_include_directories(tgbot-lib
    PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
)

target_link_libraries(tgbot-lib
    PUBLIC
        nlohmann_json::nlohmann_json
        OpenSSL::SSL
        OpenSSL::Crypto
        PkgConfig::test
        httplib::httplib
)
install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
        EXPORT ${PROJECT_NAME}-targets
        LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
        ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
        RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR}
        INCLUDES DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/tgbot
)
install(FILES ${TELEGRAM_MODELS_HEADERS}
        DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/tgbot
)
install(EXPORT ${PROJECT_NAME}-targets
        FILE ${PROJECT_NAME}Config.cmake
        NAMESPACE ${PROJECT_NAME}::
        DESTINATION lib/cmake/${PROJECT_NAME}
)
